theme_archetype.description: Premium Dark Mode SaaS with Stripe-like elegance and Linear-inspired precision for the marketing hub, transitioning to a clean, highly functional light mode for internal SaaS portals.

layout_spacing.marketing_grid: The 'Tetris' Grid - Asymmetry, visual tension, gap-8 to gap-12. Deeply layered with glassmorphic cards.
layout_spacing.dashboard_grid: The 'Control Room' Grid - Dense, scanable, gap-4 to gap-6, 1px subtle borders. Perfect for Kanban and Task Management views.
layout_spacing.general: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.

components.navbar: Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0E17]/70 border-b border-white/10. Sticky top-0 z-50.

buttons.primary: bg-[#F97316] text-white hover:bg-[#EA580C] shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(249,115,22,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(249,115,22,0.6)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 text-white border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-colors

components.inputs: bg-[#0A0E17]/50 border border-white/10 focus:border-[#F97316] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#F97316] rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-white placeholder:text-slate-500
components.cards_marketing: Crystal Glass variant: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 hover:border-[#1E3A8A] transition-colors rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-2xl
components.cards_portal: Solid flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), shadow-sm, rounded-xl p-6
components.kanban_board: Light mode portal columns: bg-slate-50/50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-slate-200. Task Cards: bg-white shadow-sm border border-slate-200 rounded-lg p-4 cursor-grab hover:shadow-md hover:border-[#1E3A8A] transition-all

motion_and_3d.hero_3d: React Three Fiber: Floating P/X geometric shapes reflecting ambient environment light. Mouse responsive rotation and tilt using Framer Motion 3D for parallax depth.
motion_and_3d.loader: Creative SVG morphing loader. The stylized 'P' morphs into an 'X', traced by an orange glowing stroke (framer-motion pathLength animation). Used on every page navigation.
motion_and_3d.scroll_animations: Staggered fade-up (opacity 0 to 1, y: 30 to 0) for ecosystem cards and services grid using Framer Motion whileInView.
motion_and_3d.hover_effects: Buttons emit a vibrant tech orange glow. Ecosystem cards exhibit a subtle lift (-translate-y-1) and 'Tracing Beam' border effect on hover.
motion_and_3d.app_extensions_portal: Features 3D Android phone mockups displaying Lead Tracking Kanban and Task Stream, floating with gentle sine wave animations (y-axis).

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute for robust automated testing (e.g., data-testid='login-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure global background in marketing site is Dark Navy (#0A0E17).
Use Outfit for Headings and Manrope for Body.
Portals (Kanban, Task Management) should contrast the marketing site by using the defined light_mode colors to improve data scanability and function.
Implement React Three Fiber strictly for the Hero P/X logo and App portal 3D phone mockups.
Never use raw transparent backgrounds over images, use the specified glassmorphism backdrop-blur.
All CTA buttons should map to the Vibrant Tech Orange accent (#F97316) with defined glowing box-shadows.
Include the creative SVG logo morph loader on initial load and route changes.
